document_info.document_type: Statement of Values spreadsheet with modifications

coverages_discussed.notes: Current locations sheet schedules Building 222340000, Contents 33432000, and BI 59212000 across 8 Texas locations for total TIV 314984000. Prior year SOV schedules Building 199124688 and Contents 29928511 for total TIV 229053199.

positives: Construction is predominantly fire resistive, masonry non-combustible, or non-combustible.
All scheduled buildings were built between 1995 and 2018.
Modification sheet indicates TIV was updated per appraisal.
concerns: All scheduled locations are in Texas.
Modification sheet notes an added warehouse facility effective 2026-03-15.
Modification sheet notes an old location was closed due to lease expiration effective 2026-03-15.
